docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Generated with shdoc, MkDocs Material, toc-md, and uv

50 source docs tracked shell assets 26 install scripts bootstrap and app setup 3 repo scripts maintenance and checks 17 local commands helpers under home/dot_local/bin 1 Claude hooks local automation policies 3 alias bundles common, client, server 23 template mappings chezmoi wrappers

docs.title: Dotfiles Shell Automation Docs
docs.text:
Reference for installation flows, local commands, aliases, Claude hooks, and chezmoi wrappers maintained in this repository.

Browse Full Catalog View Template Mapping

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
Quick Start

### Build, preview, deploy Run the documentation pipeline from the repository root. 
make docs
make serve PORT=8001
make deploy

Pipeline

### Generated end to end The site is rebuilt from tracked shell sources every time. - `mise exec shdoc -- shdoc` renders structured script references when annotations exist - fallback pages still expose aliases, functions, and raw source when `shdoc` is not enough - `mkdocs-toc-md` writes the full navigation tree to [catalog.md](catalog.md) - `uv run --with` keeps the MkDocs toolchain ephemeral

Coverage

### Browse the full tree The homepage stays curated, while the complete generated table of contents lives on its own page. - [Open the full catalog](catalog.md) - **50** source reference pages are generated from tracked shell assets - **23** chezmoi wrappers are mapped back to their source scripts

Chezmoi

### Template Mapping Wrapper templates under `home/.chezmoiscripts` are linked back to the source scripts they include. _23 mapped wrappers_ - [Open template mapping](reference/chezmoi-templates.md) - `home/.chezmoiscripts/common/run_once_after_01-setup-chezmoi-private.sh.tmpl` -> [`install/common/chezmoi_private.sh`](reference/install/common/chezmoi_private.md) - `home/.chezmoiscripts/common/run_once_after_02-install-mise.sh.tmpl` -> [`install/common/mise.sh`](reference/install/common/mise.md) - `home/.chezmoiscripts/common/run_once_after_03-install-sheldon.sh.tmpl` -> [`install/common/sheldon.sh`](reference/install/common/sheldon.md) - `home/.chezmoiscripts/common/run_once_after_99-install-gh-extensions.sh.tmpl` -> [`install/common/gh_extensions.sh`](reference/install/common/gh_extensions.md) - `home/.chezmoiscripts/macos/run_once_02-install-mac-app-store.sh.tmpl` -> [`install/macos/common/mac_app_store.sh`](reference/install/macos/common/mac_app_store.md) - `home/.chezmoiscripts/macos/run_once_04-install-iterm2.sh.tmpl` -> [`install/macos/common/iterm2.sh`](reference/install/macos/common/iterm2.md) [17 more mappings](reference/chezmoi-templates.md)

docs.title: Browse By Area
docs.text:
Each section links to generated reference pages. Update source comments, then rerun make docs to refresh the site.

Install Scripts

### Install Scripts Bootstrap and application setup flows stored under `install/**`. _26 documented entries_ - [`install/common/chezmoi_private.sh`](reference/install/common/chezmoi_private.md): Bootstraps `shunk031/dotfiles-private` using the dedicated source and config paths under the current user's home dire... - [`install/common/gh_extensions.sh`](reference/install/common/gh_extensions.md): Activates `mise` when available, ensures GitHub authentication, and installs the configured `gh` extensions. - [`install/common/mise.sh`](reference/install/common/mise.md): Downloads a pinned standalone `mise` release and runs `mise install` against the repository tool definitions. - [`install/common/sheldon.sh`](reference/install/common/sheldon.md): Downloads the latest `sheldon` binary into the user's local bin directory. - [`install/common/tpm.sh`](reference/install/common/tpm.md): Clones TPM, installs tmux plugins, and builds `tmux-mem-cpu-load` into the user's local prefix. - [`install/macos/arm64/prepare_arm64_system.sh`](reference/install/macos/arm64/prepare_arm64_system.md): Installs Rosetta on arm64 macOS machines when it is not already present. [20 more entries in the full catalog](catalog.md)

Repository Scripts

### Repository Scripts Repository maintenance and verification helpers under `scripts/**`. _3 documented entries_ - [`scripts/generate-docs.sh`](reference/scripts/generate-docs.md): Collects tracked shell sources, renders Markdown reference pages, creates a curated landing page, and writes a chezmo... - [`scripts/run_benchmark.sh`](reference/scripts/run_benchmark.md): Creates a temporary directory, records initial and average interactive zsh startup times, prints benchmark-action com... - [`scripts/run_unit_test.sh`](reference/scripts/run_unit_test.md): Dispatches the common Bats suite and the OS-specific Bats suite selected by the `OS` environment variable.

Local Commands

### Local Commands Executable helpers published from `home/dot_local/bin/**`. _17 documented entries_ - [`home/dot_local/bin/client/executable_connect-hosei-vpn`](reference/home/dot_local/bin/client/executable_connect-hosei-vpn.md): Reads the stored AnyConnect credentials from the configured JSON file and connects to the Hosei VPN host through the ... - [`home/dot_local/bin/client/executable_disconnect-vpn`](reference/home/dot_local/bin/client/executable_disconnect-vpn.md): Calls the Cisco AnyConnect CLI to disconnect the current VPN session. - [`home/dot_local/bin/client/executable_login-ghcr`](reference/home/dot_local/bin/client/executable_login-ghcr.md): Fetches the GHCR username and personal access token from 1Password and authenticates Docker against `ghcr.io`. - [`home/dot_local/bin/common/executable_cdgwq`](reference/home/dot_local/bin/common/executable_cdgwq.md): Uses `gwq list --json` and `fzf` to select a known repository path, then changes the current shell into that directory. - [`home/dot_local/bin/common/executable_cdw`](reference/home/dot_local/bin/common/executable_cdw.md): Selects the newest path returned by `gwq list --json` and changes the current shell into that repository. - [`home/dot_local/bin/common/executable_chezmoi-cd`](reference/home/dot_local/bin/common/executable_chezmoi-cd.md): Resolves `chezmoi source-path` and changes the current shell into that repository checkout. [11 more entries in the full catalog](catalog.md)

Claude Hooks

### Claude Hooks Claude Code hook scripts that enforce local automation policies. _1 documented entries_ - [`home/dot_claude/hooks/executable_enforce-uv.sh`](reference/home/dot_claude/hooks/executable_enforce-uv.md): Claude hook that inspects shell commands and returns a JSON decision that blocks direct `pip` or `python` usage, guid...

Alias Bundles

### Alias Bundles Shell alias collections for common, client, and server profiles. _3 documented entries_ - [`home/dot_config/alias/client.sh`](reference/home/dot_config/alias/client.md): Client-specific alias definitions and examples. This file currently keeps optional aliases commented out until they a... - [`home/dot_config/alias/common.sh`](reference/home/dot_config/alias/common.md): Shared shell aliases used across machines. These aliases wrap common repository and local workflow commands. - [`home/dot_config/alias/server.sh`](reference/home/dot_config/alias/server.md): Server-specific alias definitions. This file is reserved for server-only aliases and is currently empty.

# Client-specific alias definitions and examples.

  • chezmoi-private: "chezmoi --source ~/.local/share/chezmoi-private --config ~/.config/chezmoi-private/chezmoi.yaml"
  • claude-mem: '$HOME/.bun/bin/bun "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs"'

docs.title: Source
docs.text:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

# Shared shell aliases used across machines.
# These aliases wrap common repository and local workflow commands.

# Use eza for ls command
alias ls="eza --long --group --header --binary --time-style=long-iso --icons"

# Alias for private chezmoi configuration
# ref. https://www.chezmoi.io/user-guide/frequently-asked-questions/design/#can-chezmoi-support-multiple-sources-or-multiple-source-states
alias chezmoi-private="chezmoi --source ~/.local/share/chezmoi-private --config ~/.config/chezmoi-private/chezmoi.yaml"

# Alias for claude-mem
alias claude-mem='$HOME/.bun/bin/bun "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin/scripts/worker-service.cjs"'

# Alias to checkout the default branch in git
alias gm='git checkout $(git symbolic-ref refs/remotes/origin/HEAD | sed "s@^refs/remotes/origin/@@")'
